questionHtml: Using an externalities diagram, explain how coal-fired power plants in the US might be causing market failure (paragraphs [3] and [4]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The y axis may be labelled price, but could be costs or benefits, and the x axis is labelled quantity. P and Q are sufficient. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using an externalities diagram, explain how coal-fired power plants in the US might be causing market failure (paragraphs [3] and [4]).
